Name: Xandra
Description: Xandra was created by Kelly Thompson and Oscar Bazaldua in Mr. and Mrs. X mini series. Following the deaths of Professor X and Lilandra their genetic materials were used to genetically create a child. The egg was under the care of Cerise who took care of it until she was captured by the Imperial Guard in an attempt to keep the egg out of the wrong hands. The recently-married Gambit and Rogue were tasked to retrieve the egg.
